results.title: Old-School Democrat? Socialist Candidate Says He’s ‘Not Your Guy’
results.description: Michigan, the next battlefield in the Democrat civil war, saw a senate primary debate on Tuesday night. And one candidate is telling “establishment” Democrats that he’s “not your guy.” Abdul El-Sayed, endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America, attempted to advance his campaign against Rep. results.title: Maharashtra news: Uddhav Thackeray to reunite with Eknath Shinde? Pratap Sarnaik makes big statement, how can it change politics in Maharashtra?
results.description: Maharashtra Minister Pratap Sarnaik sparked fresh speculation over a possible Shiv Sena reunion after saying "anything can happen in the future" when asked about Eknath Shinde and Uddhav Thackeray joining hands. The post Maharashtra news: Uddhav Thackeray to reunite with Eknath Shinde? Pratap Sarnaik makes big statement, how can it change politics in Maharashtra? appeared first on News24 .

results.title: Supreme Court Intensifies Attack On The Constitution And The Rule of Law
results.description: Late Term Decisions Highlight Need To Curb Its Power A spate of decisions in the last two weeks of the Supreme Court’s term not only deprive Americans of fundamental rights, they further a white supremacist agenda and rob the American people of their democracy and the protections of the rule of law.
